title: Measles virus whole genome amplification (D4, B3,D8 genotypes) by in-house tiling-PCR
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"eoaie","text":"The protocols allows whole genome amplification of the Measles virus Genotypes D4, B3 and D8 by utilizing tiling-PCR and in-house designed primer sets in two pools.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Reagents TURBO DNase‱ (2 U/μL), Invitrogen Nuclease-free destillated water
Post-DNAse I treatment clean-up Reagents AMPure XP Beads, Beckman Coulter 70% EtOH (prepared freshly) Nuclease-free destillated water
Incubation in thermocycler 37 °C 00:30:00
Prepare the following master mix A B 1 TURBO DNase (2 U) 1.0 uL 2 TURBO DNase puffer 4.0 uL 3 Destillated water 6.0 uL 4 RNA 40.0 uL
Add 1.8 μl AMPure XP per 1.0 μl of sample.
Bind DNA fragments to paramagnetic beads.
Separation of beads + DNA fragments from contaminants.
Wash beads + DNA fragments twice with 70% EtOH to remove contaminants.
Elute purified DNA fragments from beads.
Transfer to new tubes.
Reagents SuperScript‱ VILO‱ cDNA Synthesis Kit, Invitrogen Nuclease-free destillated water
Prepare the following master mix A B 1 5X VILO™ Reaction Mix 4.0 uL 2 10X SuperScript™ Enzyme Mix 2.0 uL 3 Destillated water 4.0 uL 4 RNA 8.0 uL
Incubation in thermocycler 85 °C 00:05:00
Incubation in thermocycler 42 °C 01:00:00
Incubation in thermocycler 25 °C 00:10:00
Reagents Phusion‱ High-Fidelity DNA Polymerase, New England Biolabs Nuclease-free destillated water dNTP mix

Prepare the following master mixes Mix_1 A B 1 5x Phusion™ High-Fidelity PCR Master Mix with GC Buffer 4.0 uL 2 dNTP mix (10 mM) 0.4 uL 3 Phusion™ High-Fidelity DNA Polymerase 0.2 uL 4 Primer pool_1 3.0 uL 5 Destillated water 7.4 uL 6 cDNA template 5.0 uL The mix includes pool_1 primers (see section 4.2) Mix_2 %s %s
Tiling-PCR primers %s %s
Post-PCR clean-up Reagents AMPure XP Beads, Beckman Coulter 70% EtOH (prepared freshly) Nuclease-free destillated water
Add 0.8 μl AMPure XP per 1.0 μl of sample.
Bind DNA fragments to paramagnetic beads.
Separation of beads + DNA fragments from contaminants.
Wash beads + DNA fragments twice with 70% EtOH to remove contaminants.
Elute purified DNA fragments from beads.
Transfer to new tubes.
Reagents Qubit 1X dsDNA HS Assay Kit
Add 190 uL of working solution to all wells of two Qubit strips. Label the top of the tubes S1 and S2. Then add 10 uL of the respective HS Standard (1 or 2) to each tube of the two strips.
For each of your sample tubes, add 198 uL of working solution to labeled tubes. Then add 2 uL of your samples to each tube.
Vortex all strips and spin down if necessary. Incubate for 3-5 minutes at room temperature.
On the Qubit, select 1x dsDNA -> dsDNA High Sensitivity -> Read standards
Insert strip standard 1 and then select Read standard. Repeat for standard 2.
Select Run samples and read the respective wells of the strips. Use the 2 uL sample volume. When you are done.
Tiling-PCR thermocycling 1 98 °C 00:00:30 2 98 °C 00:00:10 3 52 °C 00:00:20 4 72 °C 00:00:50 5 Repeat steps 2-3-4 for 40 times. 6 72 °C 00:05:00 7 10 °C hold
